title: Limits, Derivatives, and Local Approximation
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving changing biological or economic rates. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible differential calculus computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate limit models in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive derivative definition in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute derivative rules in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
